rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA AS INDENTURED VS. NOEMI LYKKEBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff The Bank Of New York Mellon'S Motion For Summary Judgment Reset Per Court Order Of 11-17-11
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 1. Plaintiff The Bank of New York's motion for summary judgment. Grant motion for summary judgment. Moving party shifted the burden and opposing side presents no competent evidence to create a triable issue of material fact. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YANCEY, TRUSTEE OF THE MISSION ST. TRUST VS. LAVANDER CASA INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 2. Defendant Lavander Casa, Inc.'s demurrer to complaint. Off Calendar dismissal of entire action filed 11/17/11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAST MILE PROPERTIES LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIITED VS. FENG YUN YANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 7. Defendant Chen-Kow Sung's motion to set aside default/default judgment/leave to defend. Grant set aside Default/default judgment. Subject to opposition. Answer to be filed forthwith. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MENZ ZAMINSKY VS. NICOLE RIVERA AKA ESTHER SARABIA, AKA ESTHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 3. Defendant Nicole Rivera's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. Overruled 5 days to answer; Allegation re creation of partition walls sufficient. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUNICE MATEO VS. PATRICK BUTLER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 4. Defendant Nicole Rivera's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. Off calendar settled. Notice filed 11-10-11.

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES,LLC, A DELAWARE VS. TIMOTHY KANE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 5. Defendant Timothy Kane's Demurrer to Complaint Off Calendar First amended complaint filed 11/15/11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES,LLC, A DELAWARE VS. TIMOTHY KANE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 5. Defendant Timothy Kane's Motion to Strike Complaint Off Calendar First amended complaint filed 11/15/11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BD THAKOR DBA WARFIELD HOTEL et al VS. JOHN JOSEPH KELLY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 12, 2011, line 6. Defendant John Kelly's Demurrer to Complaint Sustained without leave to amend defective notice, limited payment to cash or money order precluding cashier check, etc. (501/REQ)
